---
name: " Bug Report"
about: Report a bug or issue to help improve MLOps Wine Quality Prediction
title: "[BUG] - Short description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

### Description
<!-- Just say exactly what is broken right now without overcomplicating it -->
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Commands needed to make the bug happen again. -->
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run pipeline stage '...' (e.g., dvc repro)
2. Trigger endpoint '....' (e.g., /train or /predict)
3. Check artifact file '....'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
<!-- What the correct, working behavior should look like. -->
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots / Logs
<!-- Just drop a screenshot or paste the red error text from your terminal. -->
If applicable, add screenshots, local terminal trackbacks, dvc execution logs, or Flask server runtime errors to help explain your problem.

### Environment Context
<!-- What environment are you running? Fill in your versions below. -->
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Ubuntu]
- **Python Version:** [if applicable, e.g., 3.8]
- **DVC Version:** [if applicable]
- **Docker Version:** [if applicable]

### Additional context
<!-- For anything else not covered above -->
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific raw wine dataset properties, schema.yaml mismatches, or hyperparameter variations in params.yaml).
